Linguistic Features
===================

VoxAtlas includes feature groups for lexical, morphology, phonology, and
syntax-oriented analyses.

Representative modules
----------------------

- :doc:`../api/generated/voxatlas.features.lexical`
- :doc:`../api/generated/voxatlas.features.morphology`
- :doc:`../api/generated/voxatlas.features.phonology`
- :doc:`../api/generated/voxatlas.features.syntax`

These pages provide the main entry points for exploring the generated API.
